message:
feat(fp-frame): add slice_replace, describe_dtypes, and value_counts_subset methods

Three new pandas-compatible APIs:

- StringAccessor::slice_replace(start, stop, repl): Replace a positional
  character slice in each string, matching pd.Series.str.slice_replace().
  Handles Unicode correctly via char iteration.

- DataFrame::describe_dtypes(include, exclude): Filter describe() output by
  dtype, matching pd.DataFrame.describe(include=[...], exclude=[...]).
  Supports "int64", "float64", "bool", "object"/"string", "number", "all".
  Non-numeric types produce count/unique/top/freq statistics instead of the
  standard numeric percentiles.

- DataFrame::value_counts_subset(subset): Count unique value combinations
  for a subset of columns, matching pd.DataFrame.value_counts(subset=[...]).
  Validates column existence before delegating to the existing value_counts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
